videos.description: Entry for the 2010 RMFF Film Fest. Winner of audience choice and best sperts film awards.

videos.title: The Mole Lake Tahoe (Episode1-Part1/5)
videos.description:
This episode sponsored by the Squaw Valley Adventure Center: http://www.squawadventure.com

Fans of The Mole Lake Tahoe: Join the Facebook group! http://www.facebook.com/group.php?gid...

11 players working together to earn a grand prize of up to $1000. One of them, however, is the mole. The mole will stop at nothing to sabotage the group's efforts and keep their identity a secret. Only one will unveil the mole and win the money... Can you figure it out? Who is... The Mole?

Filmed in Lake Tahoe from August 5 - August 7 2009.
